name: Nightfall
notes: Rare-tier Commander, Capital-only via Command Centre. Own stealth works exactly like Ghost Tank/Submarine/Sniper (revealRange 1, revealsOnAttack). Its aura's grant_stealth effect extends that same stealth (same revealRange/revealsOnAttack convention) to every squad currently assigned to its regiment (filter: "own_regiment", capped at maxSquadsLed: 4, same mechanism as Vanguard's speed_boost) — each squad breaks its OWN granted cloak independently when it attacks, rather than the whole regiment decloaking together. Radius set high because, as with Vanguard, regiment membership (not proximity) is what gates the effect.
